specialDismissal: Who came to willfully suffer for our salvation,
kontakia: (Tone 4) O gracious God, I sinned more than the adulteress,* and yet never offered refreshing teardrops.* In silent prayer, I now prostrate myself,* kissing with love your immaculate feet* in order to receive from you, Master,* the forgiveness of my sins.* I cry out to you:* O Savior, deliver me from the murk of my evil deeds.
